auth.section.title: Authentication
auth.section.desc: Connect your Readine account to enable article sync.
auth.code.desc: Generate a code in the Readine app → Settings → Obsidian export, then paste it here.
auth.session_expired: Session expired — please generate a new code in Readine and paste here.
auth.error.no_subscription: Your Readine subscription doesn't include Obsidian export. Open the Readine app → Settings → Subscription to upgrade.
auth.error.invalid_code: Invalid code. Please regenerate in the Readine app.
auth.error.network_error: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
auth.empty_code: Paste a code before pressing Connect.
settings.section.title: Configuration
settings.section.desc: Tune sync output, scheduling, and storage policies.
settings.output_format.title: Output format
settings.output_format.desc: How synced articles are written to your vault.
settings.path_template.title: Path template
settings.path_template.desc: Vault path for synced files. Tokens: {feedName}, {feedId}, {yyyy}, {mm}, {dd}, {title}, {articleId}.
settings.delete_policy.title: Delete policy
settings.delete_policy.desc: Keep: local file stays in vault when article is removed server-side. Delete: local file is removed, but never your local edits.
settings.auto_sync_interval.title: Auto-sync interval
settings.auto_sync_interval.desc: How often to automatically pull new articles.
settings.network_for_articles.title: Network for articles
settings.network_for_articles.desc: Which networks may be used to download article bodies.
settings.limit_cache_days.title: Remove old articles
settings.limit_cache_days.desc: Automatically remove synced articles and their attachments older than this. 'Off' disables auto-removal.
settings.sync_favorites_only.title: Download only
settings.sync_favorites_only.desc: Only download articles you've starred in Readine
settings.cleanup_exclude_favorites.title: Skip favorited
settings.cleanup_exclude_favorites.desc: Don't delete favorited articles during cache cleanup or server-side removal
settings.cleanup_exclude_notes.title: Skip with notes
settings.cleanup_exclude_notes.desc: Don't delete articles with notes during cache cleanup or server-side removal
settings.ui_language.title: Interface language
settings.ui_language.desc: Active UI language. Restart not required.
settings.actions.title: Actions
settings.actions.sync_now.desc: Trigger a sync immediately, ignoring the auto-sync schedule.
settings.actions.open_support.desc: Collect a diagnostic bundle and prepare a support request.
settings.file_template.title: Article template (markdown)
settings.file_template.desc: Template for synced markdown articles. Placeholders: {{title}}, {{date}}, {{url}}, {{tags}}, {{feedName}}, {{feedId}}, {{id}}, {{notes}}, {{text}}
settings.notifications_badge.title: Notifications badge
settings.notifications_badge.desc: Show unread count badge on the ribbon icon.
sync_progress.failed.no_auth: Not connected. Paste your code to start syncing.
notice.sync_no_auth: Not connected. Paste your code to start syncing.
notifications.title: Notifications
support.modal.title: Support request
support.modal.desc: Below is a diagnostic bundle. Review, then Send or Copy.
support.modal.bundle.label: Diagnostic bundle
support.modal.large_bundle_hint: Bundle is large — your mail client may truncate it. Prefer Copy + paste into a new email.
support.copy_failed: Copy failed. Select the text and copy manually.
settings.wizard.title: Setup
settings.wizard.desc: Configure sync preferences before starting sync.
